faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: Go to Settings > Security > Reset Password. You'll receive an email with a reset link. The link expires after 24 hours.

faqs.question: How do I change my profile picture?
faqs.answer: Go to your Profile page, click on your avatar, and select 'Change Photo'. You can upload a JPG or PNG up to 5MB.

faqs.question: How do I create a group?
faqs.answer: Click the '+' button in the sidebar under 'My Groups', enter a name and description, choose visibility (Public or Private), and click Create.

faqs.question: How do I invite someone to my group?
faqs.answer: Go to your group page, click 'Members' at the top, then 'Invite'. Search for the person by name or email and send the invitation.

faqs.question: How do I send a direct message?
faqs.answer: Click on someone's name or avatar anywhere in the app, then click 'Message'. You can also go to Messages and click the compose button.

faqs.question: How do I create a poll?
faqs.answer: When creating a post, click the 'Poll' icon. Add your question, up to 10 options, and optionally set a closing date.

faqs.question: Can I edit a post after publishing?
faqs.answer: Yes! Hover over your post and click the '...' menu, then select 'Edit'. Your post will show an 'edited' indicator.

faqs.question: How do I search for people or content?
faqs.answer: Use the search bar at the top of the page. You can filter by type: People, Posts, Groups, or Pages.

faqs.question: What are pages vs groups?
faqs.answer: Groups are collaborative spaces where members can post and discuss. Pages are broadcast channels — only admins can post, but anyone can follow and comment.

faqs.question: How do I set up notifications?
faqs.answer: Go to Settings > Notifications. You can customize which events trigger notifications: mentions, replies, group activity, etc.

faqs.question: How do I use the AI assistant?
faqs.answer: Click the sparkle icon in any conversation or page to open the AI assistant. You can ask it to summarize discussions, answer questions about content, or help draft posts.

faqs.question: How do I delete my account?
faqs.answer: Contact your organization's admin. Account deletion must be approved by an administrator for compliance reasons. Go to Settings > Account > Request Deletion.

faqs.question: Why can't I see certain posts?
faqs.answer: Posts may be restricted to specific groups or teams. If you can't see a post, you may need to join the relevant group or request access from the group admin.

faqs.question: How do I upload files?
faqs.answer: Click the paperclip icon when composing a post or message. You can upload images, documents, and videos up to 50MB.

faqs.question: How do I @mention someone?
faqs.answer: Type '@' followed by the person's name. A dropdown will appear with matching users. Select the person to mention them — they'll receive a notification.
